\"Robert Henning\" Packt book OR course:
Robert Henning is an author with Packt Publishing, specializing in game development with the Godot engine[1][2].

### Books
*   **"Godot 4 for Beginners"**: This book, published by Packt in 2025, is a guide designed to help beginners navigate the Godot 4 interface, understand nodes and scenes, and use GDScript to create both 2D and 3D games[3][4][5].
*   **"Godot 4 Best Practices"**: Also authored by Robert Henning, this book focuses on practical techniques and strategies for maintaining, scaling, and structuring larger Godot projects[6][7].

You can typically find these titles and access them through the [Packt website](https://www.packtpub.com/) or their digital library[1][8].

\"Glen D. Singh\" Packt book OR course:
Glen D. Singh is a prolific author for **Packt Publishing**, specializing in cybersecurity, network engineering, and ethical hacking[1][2][3].

You can find his works through the official **Packt website**[4][3], which offers both books and access to their broader library of content[4][3].

### Notable Books by Glen D. Singh
He has authored several well-known titles, including:
*   **The Ultimate Kali Linux Book (multiple editions)** – A comprehensive guide to penetration testing and ethical hacking using Kali Linux[5][6][7].
*   **Reconnaissance for Ethical Hackers** – Focuses on leveraging publicly available information for security assessments[8][1].
*   **CompTIA Network+ N10-008 Certification Guide** – A resource for those pursuing network administration and engineering certifications[2].
*   **Cisco Certified CyberOps Associate 200-201 Certification Guide**[7][9]
*   **Implementing and Administering Cisco Solutions (200-301 CCNA Exam Guide)**[1][7]
*   **Hands-On Penetration Testing with Kali NetHunter**[7]
*   **Hands-On AWS Penetration Testing with Kali Linux**[7]

### How to Access
*   **Packt Website:** You can search for "Glen D. Singh" directly on the [Packt website](https://www.packtpub.com/) to see his full catalog of books[4][3]. Many of these are available as eBooks or through the Packt+ subscription service, which provides access to thousands of expert-authored tech books and videos[4][3].
*   **Course/Training Info:** While primarily an author of technical books, his materials are frequently used in cybersecurity courses and training programs[1][10][11]. You can also find his publications listed on major educational platforms like TutorialsPoint[7].

\"Marco Secchi\" Packt book OR course:
Marco Secchi has authored several books for **Packt Publishing**, primarily focusing on game development with Unreal Engine[1][2].

### Books by Marco Secchi (Packt)
*   **Multiplayer Game Development with Unreal Engine 5** – This book covers the foundational principles of creating multiplayer games, including networking features, C++, and Blueprints[3][4].
*   **Artificial Intelligence in Unreal Engine 5** – A guide focused on leveraging Unreal Engine's AI framework to create engaging gameplay and AI opponents[5][6].
*   **Mastering Unreal Engine 5 Game Development with C++ Scripting** – A technical title authored by Secchi that focuses on C++ scripting within the engine[2][7].

### Additional Content
In addition to his books, Marco Secchi has contributed articles and educational content to the **Packt Learning Hub**[8][9]. For example, he has written on topics such as "Artificial Intelligence in Game Development: Understanding Behavior Trees"[8][10].

*Note: There is another professional photographer named Marco Secchi who conducts photography workshops and writes about visual storytelling[11][12], but the game development titles listed above are authored by the Marco Secchi who is a game programmer and lecturer[13][1].*

\"Mr. Hemang Doshi\" Packt book OR cours:
Hemang Doshi is a well-known author and instructor specializing in IT audit, risk management, and information security certifications[1][2]. He has published several books with **Packt Publishing** and offers various courses through **Udemy** and his own academy[3][1][4].

### Packt Publishing Books
Hemang Doshi has authored multiple study guides for Packt, primarily focused on ISACA certifications[3][2]. Key titles include:
*   **CISA – Certified Information Systems Auditor Study Guide:** This is one of his most popular works[3][5]. It is designed to be accessible to candidates from non-technical backgrounds and often includes access to online practice resources and mock exams via Packt's platform[3][6][7].
*   **Certified Information Security Manager (CISM) Exam Prep Guide:** Similar to his CISA guide, this book provides a structured approach to exam preparation[8][9].

When you purchase a print edition of his books from Packt, you typically receive access to the digital (eBook) edition, and the books often include or provide links to additional online test resources[10][8].

### Courses & Training
In addition to his books, Doshi is a highly-rated instructor on **Udemy**, where he offers video masterclasses for various certifications[1][11][12].
*   **Udemy:** He provides comprehensive video courses for certifications such as **CISA, CISM, and CRISC**[1][13][14]. These courses are frequently recommended by students for their simplified explanations and focus on exam readiness[10][13][15].
*   **Hemang Doshi Academy (HDA):** He operates his own training platform, which offers both individual and corporate training, as well as live sessions for certifications like AIGP (AI Governance Professional) and CISA[4][16][17].

For the most up-to-date information on his specific offerings, you can visit his official academy website, his instructor profile on Udemy, or his author page on the Packt Publishing website[1][5][4].

\"Ammar Mohanna\" Packt book OR course:
Ammar Mohanna has authored a book published by Packt titled **"Practical LLM Evaluation for Production Systems"** (co-authored with Indrajit Kar and Zonunfeli Ralte), released in June 2026[1][2][3].

### Book Details
*   **Title:** *Practical LLM Evaluation for Production Systems*[2][4]
*   **Focus:** The book provides practical frameworks, metrics, and operational strategies for evaluating LLM-powered systems[4]. It covers a wide range of topics, including reliability, safety, latency, cost, and evaluation strategies for various architectures such as agentic systems, Text2SQL, retrieval pipelines, and multimodal conversational systems[4].
*   **Availability:** It is available through Packt Publishing in both eBook and paperback formats[5][4].

Ammar Mohanna is an AI and machine learning specialist, lecturer, and consultant with extensive experience in fields such as MLOps, explainable AI, and agentic systems[1][6]. While he is a frequent contributor to AI discussions and academic courses (such as those at the American University of Beirut)[7][6], his primary formal publication with Packt at this time is the book mentioned above[5][4].
